summary: Verified DogeFood Lab bug fixes - Iteration 7. All 12 backend tests PASSED. Both critical bugs confirmed FIXED: 1) NFT holder VIP bonus - 47/53 wallet players verified as holders, all have VIP status, batch verification endpoint working. 2) Player count consistency - stats.total_players=52 matches leaderboard count=52 exactly (difference: 0).
critical_code_review_comments: ✅ Stats endpoint (line 2655-2658) correctly filters by points > 0 AND valid nickname
✅ Leaderboard endpoint (line 2593) default limit increased to 200
✅ Batch NFT verification endpoint (lines 1768-1860) properly verifies and credits VIP bonus
✅ Server-side blockchain fallback (lines 2868-2882) checks on-chain when frontend reports is_holder=false
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bug fixes verified on both preview and production backends. Player count consistency: stats.total_players=52 matches leaderboard count=52. NFT verification: 47 holders credited, all have is_vip=true. Test file /app/backend/tests/test_bug_fixes.py can be used for regression testing.
